narrative:
Brecksville-00-I (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,144 registered voters, with 53.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.4%, a modest Republican lean of 5.5 percentage points.
